description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing male figure dressed in historical attire, featuring a long red cloak with gold trim draped over his shoulders and a tunic underneath. The figure has a bearded face with shoulder-length hair and is barefoot, with one foot slightly forward as if in motion. His arms are bent at the elbows, with one hand extended forward and the other held closer to his body, suggesting a gesture of offering or communication. The cloak is detailed with folds and tassels, and the tunic is accented with a decorative border. The sculpture stands on a textured base that mimics rough ground. The overall finish is matte, with muted earth tones and realistic anatomical proportions.
description: A detailed sculpture of a bearded man in a red cloak and tunic, standing barefoot with one arm extended. The figure is lifelike, with intricate clothing folds and a textured base.
description_view_0: The front-left view shows the man's expressive face, extended right arm, and the detailed draping of his cloak and tunic.
description_view_1: The rear view highlights the full length and flow of the red cloak, obscuring most of the figure's body and face.
description_view_2: The back-left view emphasizes the broad expanse of the cloak and the figure's posture, with only the side of the head and hand visible.
description_view_3: The front view provides a clear look at the man's facial features, both arms, and the layered clothing, with the cloak partially open.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
